key_finding: Experiment B NULL RESULT: Synonym paraphrase drops partial-TF accuracy by 0.6% (1/168, p=1.0); random replacement drops 6.0% (10/168, p=0.002). Full TF: 100% all conditions (uninformative — model copies last number). Non-number token choices do NOT carry essential hidden computation info. FALSE-hypothesis predictions confirmed 5/5 vs TRUE-hypothesis 3/7.
evidence_impact: Phase 2 natural_usage remains STRONG. Paraphrase disruption null constrains the hypothesis: hidden channel EXISTS (probing evidence) but is NOT carried through non-number token choices. Model reads mathematical content (numbers/operations), not specific surface words. Compatible with 'lossy projection' framing — text is lossy but sufficient.
next_planned: Cross-model partial TF on Phi. Or number-token perturbation (16→sixteen). Or semantic context disruption on non-arithmetic task. Or position-sweep replication on Phi.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Probing evidence strong (V|nums on 2 families, position-sweep, nums-control). WRRA on 2 families. Experiment B NULL: non-number tokens don't carry essential hidden info (synonym 0.6% drop p=1.0). Hidden channel exists but operates through number-token K/V patterns, not surface words.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: V|nums on 2 families (Qwen, Phi). WRRA on 2 families. Position sweep on Qwen only (needs Phi replication).
